Peach (and Apple?) Trees in Parking Lot of Bike Shop... Pear (and Apple?) behind parking lot on back alley going South (turn right out of the parking lot) in front of a house. Access: Private but overhanging. Falling Fruit season: June-August.

Division St, between Merritt and Hillside, on East side of street. Tons of apples everywhere... you can't miss it.
Decent apples for munching... Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: June-August.
